notes: warnUnexplainedChanges writes one actionable stderr line ('commit them or record them with tp keep'); never emitted for keep-listed changes, never changes exit code, no JSON contract touched.

hc rejection uses ExitUsage(2) with actionable hcCommitHint; all error paths use output.Error with correct exit codes (2/3/4/1); success serializes the full task via output.JSON — commit_shas is omitempty (never null), commit_sha mirror is *string. Deterministic.

Asserts hc rejects commit/auto-commit/bare-done with exit 2 (explicitly not 4), partial batch exits 1 not 4, hint text 'commit_strategy is hc', and the batch failed-row JSON shape (closed/failed/failures[].error). Exercises the contract correctly.

runTP harness always passes --json and sets NO_COLOR=1 + TP_HC=0 for deterministic commit_strategy resolution; lifecycle tests json.Unmarshal stdout, verify exit codes and field presence (closed_at/closed_reason non-nil). Consistent with the JSON+exit-code contract.

hc rejection ExitUsage(2) + hcCommitHint; all error paths correct exit codes; success emits fixed-shape map {id,sha,message} via output.JSON (deterministic key-sorted). SetCommitSHAs writes canonical commit_shas + mirror. No null-slice or bloat.

Verifies commit_shas serializes as JSON array ([]any{'aaa','bbb'}), commit_sha mirrors [0], covered-by and reopen leave both nil (assert.Nil), duplicate exits 1, set rejects managed field exit 2. Directly asserts the empty=>absent (omitempty), not-null contract.

warnCommitStrategy emits only stderr warnings (unrecognized value; hc-absent-from-PATH), neither changes exit code nor JSON; returns the concrete builtin/hc effective strategy. hcCommitHint constant is a single actionable message.

resolvedConfig and runConfig emit fixed-shape maps via output.JSON (json.Marshal key-sorted => deterministic, no Go map-iteration leak); commit_strategy resolves to normalized name and commit_strategy_effective exposes concrete behavior; warnings go to stderr; --compact documented no-op. No null-collection or bloat regression.

Asserts resolved-config source/value attribution: a clamped out-of-range override reports source 'project' (not 'override'), and a task-file commit_strategy reports source 'override' resolving unrecognized => 'builtin'. Verifies the deterministic {value,source} contract shape.

Single/multi/batch emit fixed-shape result maps via output.JSON; nil-slice hygiene (closedIDs/failed = make([]...,0) => '[]' not null); failures only added when non-empty; correct exit codes (all-fail 4/partial 1/ok 0); hc batch enforcement fails the row with hcCommitHint. Deterministic; report summary only when fully done (no bloat).

Read-only worktree classifier; no file write, no lock needed. ClassifyPaths (L23) and NormalizeKeepPath (L30) errors are checked with documented fail-safe fallbacks (over-report / raw path), not swallowed.

All task-file mutation is inside engine.WithFileLock (L128); model.WriteTaskFile at L169 within the lock. stdin/reason-file/discover errors all handled. resolveEffectiveStrategy dropped-error is documented and re-caught by ReadTaskFile exit-3.
Test file. Uses t.TempDir + filepath.Join + os.WriteFile 0o600 (L18); errors asserted via require.NoError. No production write path or unlocked mutation.
Test harness. binaryPath built with filepath.Join (L24); build/run errors handled via panic/t.Fatalf. os.RemoveAll cleanup ignore (L32) is idiomatic test teardown. No task-file write path.

WriteTaskFile (L131) inside WithFileLock (L50). git stage/commit errors propagated (%w at L183/L203) and handled. The one _ = runGit rm --cached --ignore-unmatch (L108) is documented best-effort that cannot error on no-match; not a swallowed-error finding.
Test file exercising commit_shas record/mirror/reopen/duplicate paths. No production write path, no unlocked mutation, no unsafe path construction.

No file writes; only stderr warnings. LoadTaskWorkflowOverride dropped-error (L22) is explicitly documented and re-caught by the command's own ReadTaskFile exit-3 downstream (not a finding per prompt).

Read/print only. LoadProjectConfig/LoadLocalConfig (L93-94) and LoadTaskWorkflowOverride (L109) dropped-errors are documented (per-command loader exit 3). ResolveEffectiveWorkflow error handled via errors.As MalformedConfigError -> exit 3 (L111-120).
Test file for resolvedConfig clamp/source labeling. No production write path, no lock or path-safety surface.

All three write paths (single L169, multi L374, batch L611) wrap WriteTaskFile in WithFileLock; auto-commit git ops run inside the lock. json.Marshal ignore (L239) is a map of primitives that cannot fail. readBatchEntries checks scanner.Err (L916, round-3 fix). Reason-source read errors propagated with %w.
Both helpers doc-commented; ClassifyPaths/NormalizeKeepPath errors handled fail-safe with comments; nothing propagated so no %w needed; no slice reaches JSON; no TODO/dead code.

New hc-strategy rejection block is minimal and clear; errors surfaced via output.Error+os.Exit; output.JSON(task) is a struct not a nil slice. runClose length is pre-existing (change added ~5 lines), not manufactured per role guidance.
setupCloseStrategyProject doc-commented; Test* naming consistent; TP_HC-based determinism documented in runTP; no maintainability issues.
Unchanged by v0.28.0 (diff +0/-0); runTP doc-commented, TestMain builds binary; helpers follow project patterns; no findings.
gitStage/gitCommit wrap propagated errors with %w (L183, L203); the git rm --cached ignore is intentional with comment (L104-108); SetCommitSHAs used for SHA recording; no nil-slice JSON; no TODO.
taskState helper is idiomatic; tests follow Test* naming and assert commit_shas/commit_sha mirror and reopen-clears; no maintainability issues.

hcCommitHint const and both functions doc-commented; LoadTaskWorkflowOverride error intentionally dropped with a comment mirroring the config.go pattern; warnings emitted to stderr without changing exit code; naming consistent.

All functions doc-commented; typed-error handling via errors.As (L113-114); commit_strategy resolved-name handling documented (L55-57); defaults map built with make; warnings surfaced to stderr; no nil-slice JSON, no TODO.
Both tests doc-commented with spec-section references (§3.4/§10.8, §10.7); clear arrange/act/assert; follows project test conventions.

New resolveCommitSHAs is doc-commented and <25 lines; hc-strategy checks clear (L127-138); resolveMultiReason wraps with %w; nil-slice failures only added to result when len>0 (L816-817); closedIDs/failed use make([],0). Long handlers (runDoneSingle/Multi/Batch) are pre-existing lengths, not flagged per role guidance.
tp resume oracle: AssembleResume reads durable state (task file, spec, .tp-review, .tp/local.json, git) and reports phase + next action; command registered in root.go:84.
Commit delegation: commit_strategy resolves builtin/auto/hc; under hc tp records the task<->commit link (commit_shas) while the agent commits with hc.
keep-list (keep_uncommitted) durable in .tp/local.json; Load/Update under flock; model KeepEntry{path,reason} in projectconfig.go:31,38-41.
tp resume is read-only (no write, no reset command); it reconstructs state from disk so an orchestrator may reset at any boundary.
Keep-list is clarity: ClassifyPaths separates kept vs unexplained changes; wip-without-commit safety lives in existing task state, not the keep-list.
Durable state is the note: resume reads recorded rounds, closed_reason, commit_shas, and keep reasons; no planning lives only in context.
Report, do not force: warnUnexplainedChanges never changes exit code and tp neither commits nor discards; resume/keep never spawn agents or run hc.
Agent-agnostic: HasHC only probes PATH via exec.LookPath (or TP_HC); tp never invokes hc, so hc is an optional auto-detected peer.
Output schema field 1 phase: ResumeResult.Phase, one of review/decompose/implement/audit/release (phase.go constants).
Output schema field 2 spec: ResumeResult.Spec is the resolved spec path string.
Output schema field 3 changes: uncommitted paths not on keep-list, byte-sorted (sort.Strings); empty on non-git tree (WorktreeChanges returns []).
Output schema field 4 kept: {path,reason} per matched file, first-match reason, byte-sorted on path.
Output schema field 5 next_action {command,summary,payload}; command *string is null for decompose/release.
Output schema field 6 blockers: BuildBlockers emits in fixed code order; empty (non-nil) when none.
Strategy builtin: tp performs the commit itself; tp commit / done --auto-commit / done --commit all work (done.go/commit.go builtin paths).
Strategy hc: tp performs no commit; agent records via tp done --commit; tp commit and done --auto-commit rejected under hc.
Strategy auto: EffectiveCommitStrategy resolves to hc when hc on PATH else builtin.
Non-goal: no command resets/compacts/spawns context; resume is read-only reporting only.
Non-goal: no new agent-runtime coupling; no driver binary ships (only cmd/tp), core reuses existing state files.
Non-goal: no change to convergence semantics; resume reads existing Converged/StateStale unchanged.
Non-goal: commit_strategy stays read-only workflow field (readOnlyWorkflowFields); no tp set --workflow path.
Non-goal: tp neither invokes hc nor computes hunk assignments; HasHC only probes PATH.
Non-goal: SetCommitSHAs records the agent-provided list; tp does not generate or split a diff.
Non-goal: task<->commit link is commit_shas field, not a message trailer; no message-scaffold command under hc.
Non-goal: no hard clean-tree gate and no sweeping; warn-only, never commits or discards.
Non-goal: no free-form notes store; the cross-reset note is structured KeepEntry.reason plus existing channels.
Non-goal: keep-list lives in git-ignored .tp/local.json (LocalConfig), not committed and not spec-scoped.
Non-goal: matching uses filepath.Match (no ** recursive glob).
Non-goal: no persisted done lifecycle marker; release is the terminal phase.
Boundary 'review converged before decomposition': zero tasks + review converged yields decompose phase, enabling the reset at review-loop end.
Boundary 'between review rounds': review phase next_action carries round/unresolved so a between-rounds reset resumes cleanly.
Boundary 'decomposition imported': once tasks exist and are not all done, phase is implement, marking decomposition as finished.
Boundary 'between implementation tasks': implement phase with per-task next_action (tp next) supports a reset between tasks.
Boundary 'all tasks done before audit': all done + audit unconverged yields audit phase.
Boundary 'between audit rounds': audit phase next_action carries round/unresolved for a between-rounds reset.
Boundary 'audit converged before release': all done + audit converged yields release phase (no reset; human-approved release).
Blocker unexplained-changes agent-clearable when changes non-empty; data {count}.
Blocker no-ready-task escalate when implement with open tasks but none ready; data {blocked_by:[...]}.
Blocker review-budget-exhausted escalate; fires only when review_max_rounds!=0 and rounds>=cap and not converged; data {cap}.
Blocker audit-budget-exhausted escalate; phase-gated, 0 cap never fires; data {cap}.
Blocker spec-stale escalate when reviewStale and phase implement/audit; data {spec}.
Task.CommitSHAs []string omitempty; UnmarshalJSON and SetCommitSHAs keep commit_sha mirrored to commit_shas[0]; a pre-0.28.0 task with only commit_sha reads back unchanged.

Plain tp config adds top-level commit_strategy_effective (builtin/hc after auto resolution); --resolved keeps commit_strategy as {value,source} normalized name (config.go:57-60); warnCommitStrategy prints stderr warnings for unrecognized/hc-absent.
SKILL.md/README.md/REFERENCE.md document tp resume, tp keep, commit_strategy, reference driver (13/20/12 matches); CLAUDE.md:213 adds the v0.28.0 hc close-flow self-development rule.
tp done --commit repeatable, resolveCommitSHAs dedups (duplicate exits 1); SetCommitSHAs records in order, commit_sha mirrors [0]; --covered-by records neither. Confirmed by commit_shas_test.go.

unexplainedChangeCount classifies vs keep-list (excludes tp's own task-file/lock writes); warnUnexplainedChanges prints one-line stderr count, exit 0; keep-listed change produces no warning; no commit/discard. Wired into done/close/batch.
tp keep add/update, --remove (absent path no-op exit 0), --list prints [] when empty; missing reason or malformed glob exit 2; path stored repo-root-relative. Registered root.go:98.
MatchKeepList uses filepath.Match, first matching entry wins and supplies reason; ClassifyPaths splits into kept/changes; ErrBadPattern surfaced.
LocalConfig.KeepUncommitted *[]KeepEntry{path,reason}; nil marshals omitted, non-nil empty marshals as [].

UpdateKeepList reads/writes keep_uncommitted in .tp/local.json under flock; NormalizeKeepPath stores repo-root-relative; projectconfig.go:214-224 preserves presence (absent stays absent, explicit empty stays []).
tp reopen clears commit_shas, commit_sha, gate_passed_at, gate_skipped_reason; tp set rejects commit_shas as managed field (set.go:26) with exit 2. Confirmed by commit_shas_test.go.
DetectPhase implements the task-first ordering (implement/audit/release/decompose/review); open task yields implement even when stale (staleness surfaces as blocker).
AssembleResume builds {phase,spec,changes,kept,next_action,blockers}; changes/kept byte-sorted; performs no write.
Blocker objects {code,class,message,data} in fixed order; unexplained-changes agent-clearable, others escalate; budget blockers phase-gated, never fire when max_rounds==0.

tp resume: spec argument wins (SpecAdjacentTaskFile), exit 3 when no task file/spec; emits JSON when piped; --compact strips summary/kept.reason/blocker.message keeping data; writes no file. Registered root.go:84.
BuildNextAction: review/audit round=len(rounds)+1, unresolved=0 for first round; implement previews {task,wip}; decompose/release commands null.

Under effective hc, tp commit (commit.go:44-48), done --auto-commit and bare done (done.go:127-138), tp close (close.go:94-98) rejected exit 2 with hint; batch bad row is failed row (done.go:745-748); no exit-4. Confirmed by close_strategy_test.go.
ResolveCommitStrategy: task>project>auto default; auto->hc when hc on PATH else builtin; present-unrecognized->builtin with warning; absent->auto. Confirmed by commitstrategy_test.go.
BuildBlockers tests cover code/class/message/data shapes, agent-clearable+escalate, budget at cap, budget-zero-never-fires, spec-stale, fixed emission order, clean-is-empty-not-nil.
Builtin commit/auto-commit work; hc rejects commit/auto-commit/bare done exit 2 (asserts not exit 4); commit and covered-by close; batch bad row is failed row (exit 1 partial, per spec §5.4).
RecordTwoWithMirror, RecordSingle, DuplicateExit1, CoveredByRecordsNone, SetRejectsManagedField, ReopenClears, BuiltinCommitRecordsSingleElement all present.
CompactStripsHumanFieldsKeepsData and WritesNoFile cover --compact stripping summary/kept.reason/blocker.message while keeping data, and read-only JSON-when-piped.
TestResume_NoTaskFileNoArgExit3, SpecArgumentWinsOverDiscovered, AbsentAdjacentTaskFileYieldsReview cover the three described cases.
UnexplainedChangeWarnsButExits0 (stderr count, change unmodified) and KeptChangeProducesNoWarning cover the described behavior.
AddOverwriteRemoveList (empty []), RemoveAbsentIsNoOp, MissingReasonExit2, MalformedGlobExit2, SubdirStoredRepoRootRelative, WritesOnlyLocalConfig (no task/.tp-review write).
ImplementPayloadPrefersWIP/FirstReady/NoReadyBlocker, Review/AuditPayloadFirstRound (unresolved 0), Decompose/ReleasePayloadNullCommand all present.

TestDetectPhase + TestAssembleResume_ImplementEvenWhenStale/AuditWhenAllDoneUnconverged/ReleaseWhenAuditConverged/DecomposeWhenReviewConverged/ReviewWhenUnconverged cover all transitions incl stale->implement.
TestResolveCommitStrategy (precedence, auto default, unrecognized->builtin with warning) + TestEffectiveCommitStrategy (auto->hc/builtin, explicit hc, builtin).
ChangesModifiedStagedUntracked (count), StagedRenameReportsDestination, KeepMovesChangeToKept, GlobMatchesTwoFiles (two kept, first reason), NonGitDirectoryEmptyArrays all present.
WorktreeChanges runs git status --porcelain=v1 -z -uall at repo root; parsePorcelainZ yields dest for staged rename (R/C skip origin), untracked enumerated; non-git yields empty slice.
